message:
test(fuzz): add oauth token, callback, pkce verifier fuzz targets

- fuzz_oauth_token_response: TokenResponse JSON deserialize + OAuthTokens
  construction + update_from_response; exercises empty-token guards and
  scope-widening defense.
- fuzz_oauth_callback_url: AuthorizationCallback::from_url / from_query
  over arbitrary &str with expected_state validation.
- fuzz_pkce_verifier: RFC 7636 length (43..=128) and charset checks on
  Pkce::from_verifier for both Plain and S256 methods.

30s smoke runs: 11k/7.4k/3.3k exec/s, no crashes.

Cod_4 / SunnyMoose (FUZZING auditor)

files.patch:
@@ -1312,6 +1312,17 @@ dependencies = [
  "tracing",
 ]
 
+[[package]]
+name = "fcp-auth-schema"
+version = "0.1.0"
+dependencies = [
+ "chrono",
+ "ciborium",
+ "fcp-cbor",
+ "serde",
+ "thiserror 2.0.17",
+]
+
 [[package]]
 name = "fcp-bootstrap"
 version = "0.1.0"
@@ -1369,6 +1380,7 @@ dependencies = [
  "ciborium",
  "ed25519-dalek",
  "fcp-async-core",
+ "fcp-auth-schema",
  "fcp-cbor",
  "fcp-crypto",
  "futures-util",
@@ -1395,6 +1407,8 @@ dependencies = [
  "coset",
  "curve25519-dalek",
  "ed25519-dalek",
+ "fcp-auth-schema",
+ "fcp-cbor",
  "frost-ed25519",
  "hex",
  "hkdf",

@@ -283,5 +283,26 @@ test = false
 doc = false
 bench = false
 
+[[bin]]
+name = "fuzz_oauth_token_response"
+path = "fuzz_targets/oauth_token_response.rs"
+test = false
+doc = false
+bench = false
+
+[[bin]]
+name = "fuzz_oauth_callback_url"
+path = "fuzz_targets/oauth_callback_url.rs"
+test = false
+doc = false
+bench = false
+
+[[bin]]
+name = "fuzz_pkce_verifier"
+path = "fuzz_targets/pkce_verifier.rs"
+test = false
+doc = false
+bench = false
+
 [workspace]
 members = ["."]
